name: Pet-Vac
description: Pet-Vac is the Mini version of the Air Skylander, Jet-Vac. He made his debut in Skylanders: Trap Team.
biography: The Skylander Minis started off as regular 'Sidekicks', assisting the Skylanders on many exciting adventures. And what they lacked in size they more than made up for in courage. Ultimately determined to become full-fledged heroes, they trained at the Skylands Academy - honing their powers and skills until they were ready. Now, they stand side by side with their full grown counterparts, ready to defend Skylands against Kaos and his evil minions.
personality: Pet Vac is an honorable soldier who gladly puts the needs of others before himself. His bravery and heroism earned him the respect of his teammates.

story.content: During the day of their graduation, Pet-Vac was placed as team leader of the Minis by Master Eon. During a training simulation test, Pet Vac was stuck at the decision between saving Gill Runt or stopping a virtual Super Evil Kaos, losing Gill Runt in the process. Because of this hesitation, they failed the test when Kaos overwhelmed them with magical lava. Master Eon ended the training and reassured Pet Vac that Skylanders aren't always expected to win, but the young Sky Baron would have to make hard decisions one day. The Minis tried to help Pet Vac by going through the books in the Academy Library to boost his confidence in being team leader, but stopped when Mini Jini alerted her friends that the Doom Raiders have taken over the Academy and turned all the adult faculty into gold statues. Thanks to the Minis' encouragement, Pet Vac formulated a plan by having half of the Minis lead Wolfgang and Dr. Krankcase into a trap while the young Sky Baron secretly went after the Golden Queen. He managed to swipe the Queen's golden egg and evade her, but was forced to come out of hiding when The Gulper, in his massive size, had captured all of the other Minis. Not wanting to bring harm to his friends, Pet Vac willingly gave the Golden Queen back her golden egg, but used his vacuum gun to suck the Queen's staff into his possession, using it to turn The Gulper to a golden statue and freeing the Minis. The Golden Queen was forced to surrender when Pet Vac threatened to turn her into a statue, ending the Doom Raider threat. During the graduation ceremony, the Minis, including Pet Vac, were officially declared full-fledged Skylanders for their efforts.

trivia: Pet Vac is the only Mini who is the counterpart of a core Skylander from Giants.
He and Small Fry are the only Mini counterparts of core Skylanders who didn't appear in Spyro's Adventure.
He and Weeruptor, besides Barkley, are the only Minis who have variants.
Coincidentally, both of their original counterparts are the only Skylanders with Mini counterparts new to Trap Team who have SuperCharger forms in Skylanders: SuperChargers.
gameplay: Pet-Vac functions as a projectile-based fighter who uses his vacuum gun to control the battlefield. He can fire high-velocity air blasts to damage enemies from a distance or use his suction ability to pull smaller enemies toward him, leaving them vulnerable. His jetpack provides excellent aerial mobility, allowing him to hover over hazards and reposition quickly during combat.

basic.name: Vac Blaster
basic.content: Fire a blast of pressurized air at your enemies.

basic.name: Suction Gun
basic.content: Suck up enemies and then fire them back out.

basic_upgrades.name: Jet-Vac Jet Pack
basic_upgrades.content: Hold the jump button to hover in the air.

basic_upgrades.name: Air-Tight
basic_upgrades.content: Vac Blaster shots travel further and do more damage.

basic_upgrades.name: Vac Blaster 9000
basic_upgrades.content: Further upgrades to the Vac Blaster for maximum efficiency.

basic_upgrades.name: Fiester Fan
basic_upgrades.content: A powerful fan upgrade to enhance air-based attacks.

soulgems.name: Eagle-Air Mastery
soulgems.content: While hovering, you can fire a powerful air strike that hits all nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Vacuum Lung
abilities.content: Increase the range and power of the Suction Gun.

abilities.name: Flying High
abilities.content: Increases speed and attack power while in the air.
